name: Differential Amplifier
description: NPN BJT long-tail pair differential amplifier with dual supply. Measures differential gain. Foundation of most analog IC front-ends.

parameters.name: R_L
parameters.label: Collector Load Resistor
parameters.description: Load resistor from VCC to each collector

parameters.name: R_E
parameters.label: Emitter Degeneration Resistor
parameters.description: Degeneration resistor from each emitter to tail (bypassed by Ce)

parameters.name: R_tail
parameters.label: Tail Resistor
parameters.description: Tail current setting resistor to VEE

metrics.name: Diff_Gain_dB
metrics.label: Differential Gain
metrics.description: Differential voltage gain (Vout_diff / Vin_diff) in dB

active_region_requirements.comment: Both transistors must be in active region with sufficient headroom

design_constraints.name: tail_current_range
design_constraints.description: Tail current should be 0.2mA to 5mA for proper operation

design_constraints.name: collector_headroom
design_constraints.description: Collector must be at least 1V above emitter for active region

design_constraints.name: output_swing
design_constraints.description: Output must have headroom for signal swing

saturation.description: Low gain may indicate one or both transistors in saturation

cutoff.description: Negative gain indicates transistor cutoff or invalid bias

excessive_gain.description: Unusually high gain may indicate simulation artifact
